name: Patient Case
history: History of recurring conflicts and strained relationships. Ongoing trust and boundary issues in relationships. Some relationships involve alcoholism. History of aggressive behavior.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: If I let people in, they will hurt me.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't trust anyone, so I will always be alone.
coping_strategies: Avoiding close relationships to prevent being hurt.
situation: Spending holidays alone and reflecting on feelings of sadness and loneliness.
auto_thought: I will always be alone because no one can be trusted.
